title: Hermann Hesse on Solitude, the Value of Hardship, the Courage to Be Yourself, and How to Find Your Destiny
excerpt: "No one can build you the bridge on which you, and only you, must cross the river of life," the young Nietzsche wrote.

title: The Art of Losing and the Art of Beckoning Love Back: The Story Behind One of the Greatest Poems Ever Written
excerpt: You wouldn't have bet on it, the frail famous poet teaching at Harvard as a visiting professor and the athletic secretary of the campus residence half her age.
